summary: iOS 👀 | 5200 | 4320 | DFU is NOT blocked during the call
scenario: DFU firmware update is not blocked during an active softphone call on Voyager 5200
description_clean: DFU (firmware update) is not blocked during an active call. When a user is on a softphone call (e.g., Zoom) with a Voyager 5200 headset and navigates to Device Settings > Software to tap Update, they are taken to the Software Update screen and allowed to trigger DFU. Expected behavior: a popup message should inform the user that DFU is not available during a call.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Voyager 5200 headset to the device.
3. Place an active call using a softphone app (e.g., Zoom) via the headset.
4. While on the active call, navigate to the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Tap on the connected Voyager 5200 device name to open Device Settings.
6. Scroll to and tap 'Software' under Device Settings.
7. Tap the 'Update' button on the Software screen.
expected: A popup message should appear informing the user that DFU (firmware update) is not available during an active call, and the update should not proceed.
actual: The user is taken to the Software Update screen and allowed to trigger DFU (firmware update) without any blocking popup or message.
